name: naver-ai-blogger
description: Login to Naver and publish Codex-written restaurant posts to Naver Blog.

interface.shortDescription: Publish restaurant posts to Naver Blog from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for Naver login, persisted cookie sessions, local image upload, and Naver Blog publishing.
defaultPrompt: Use naver to login with my Naver credentials.
Use naver-blog to publish a restaurant post with these photos.
